title: “In 1952 we sent a signal to the cosmos…” - Eric Weinstein #uap #aliens

transcript.text: I think in 1952 we sent a signal to the
cosmos which is that we're very very
close to being in possession of root
level knowledge if there was something
or someone there to hear us they
probably heard us as saying we're on the
verge of being able to come visit that's
